$comment: Despia build configuration for FireOps HQ. Despia wraps the published web app at https://fire-buddy-mobile.lovable.app as native iOS and Android apps. Most of these values can also be set in Despia's web dashboard if you prefer the UI — this file is provided so you have a single source of truth.

permissions.NSCameraUsageDescription: FireOps HQ uses the camera to capture receipts, truck photos, inspection photos, crew portraits, and signed documents in the field.
permissions.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FireOps HQ accesses your photo library so you can attach existing receipts, truck photos, inspection photos, and operational documents.
permissions.NSPhotoLibraryAddUsageDescription: FireOps HQ saves shift ticket PDFs and receipt copies to your photo library when you choose to export them.
